layoutRegions.name: sla-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarizes overdue removals, at-risk SLA windows, paused exceptions, and breach packet readiness.

layoutRegions.name: revocation-lanes
layoutRegions.purpose: Shows queue aging by system with owners, blockers, escalations, pauses, and breach state.

layoutRegions.name: breach-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Tracks escalations, dependency blockers, exception pauses, and audit-ready breach evidence.

components.name: SlaLane
components.purpose: Queue lane card for revocation SLA status and owner escalation.
interactions: aging chip remains visible at all widths

components.name: EscalationRow
components.purpose: Ownership escalation row with due time, path, reason, and breach state.
interactions: row layout collapses to one column on narrow viewports

components.name: EvidenceChecklist
components.purpose: Audit packet checklist for revocation SLA breach evidence.

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
